rationale: Codebase-pin lens: round-2 code is real and substantive, no stubs. (1) migrationRunState is a minimal {Stage string json:"stage"} projection that matches Bead-3 State.Stage (internal/layout/runstate.go) and doctor runState.Stage (json tag "stage"). migrationTerminalStage="applied" matches stageApplied and the doctor OK stage exactly. migrationRunInProgress has a real body: ReadFile(state.json) → json.Unmarshal → returns Stage!="" && Stage!="applied". The recovery exception now keys on a non-terminal stage, not mere dir existence — the R5 hard_block is genuinely closed: a completed/applied/stateless run no longer suppresses ErrMixedLayout. (2) SpecsDir/DomainsDir delegate to resolveArtifact(root,"specs"|"domains"); resolveArtifact is flat-first→isFlatTree→DocsDir join, so byte-identical to filepath.Join(DocsDir(root),...) on canonical/legacy/greenfield, flat when flat present. (3) Tests assert substantively against real stage values: in-progress("after-mv")→tolerated(err nil); completed("applied")→ErrMixedLayout; state-less dir→ErrMixedLayout; TestSpecsDirAndDomainsDir covers canonical/legacy/flat + greenfield byte-identity + flat-first precedence. No hollow assertions, no dead code. encoding/json import used. Scope-clean (3 files). Behavior-preserving — no moves.

findings.issue: R5 round-1 hard_block (mixed-layout recovery mis-scoped to ANY migrations dir, letting completed/stale runs suppress ErrMixedLayout) is ADDRESSED: migrationRunInProgress reads state.json and keys on a non-terminal stage; the terminal value "applied" mirrors stageApplied and the doctor OK stage 1:1.

R6 round-1 non-blocking major (need flat-aware enumerator roots for Bead 2) is ADDRESSED: SpecsDir/DomainsDir delegate to resolveArtifact and are byte-identical to filepath.Join(DocsDir(root),...) on canonical/legacy/greenfield. Enumerators themselves untouched — correct Bead-1 scope.

New tests use real schema/stage values: writeMigrationState emits {"run_id":...,"stage":...} matching State; "after-mv" is a genuine non-terminal stage and "applied" the genuine terminal one. Assertions are concrete (LayoutMixed + err sense). Not hollow.
